resources.string: Notification permission is optional and can be set later
I understand and accept the above disclaimer

Before using Box, please read the following carefully.

Purpose
Box is a network proxy management tool that requires Root access to modify device network routing. It is intended solely for lawful purposes such as network debugging, privacy protection, and security research.

Disclaimer
This application is provided "as is" without any warranties. The developer is not liable for any damages arising from its use, including:
\u0020\u0020• Network connectivity issues
\u0020\u0020• Data loss or corruption
\u0020\u0020• Device malfunction caused by improper use
\u0020\u0020• Any consequences of bypassing network restrictions

User Responsibility
You are solely responsible for ensuring your use complies with all applicable local laws and regulations. The developer assumes no responsibility for any illegal use.

Root Access
This application requires Root privileges to function. Improper use of Root may cause system instability or data loss. Please ensure you understand the risks involved.

Network Traffic
Box may modify your device\'s network routing and DNS resolution. All traffic management is performed locally on your device.
Show persistent notification when service is running
Start proxy service automatically on boot
## Failed to get content. \n - You can visit [here](%URL%) to view the origin content. \n - Or try to [refresh](box://refresh) this page.
